channel.title: Asian Journal of Law and Economics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Asian Journal of Law and Economics

item.title: The Role of Judges in Selecting Efficient Norms in a Common Law System: A Law and Economics Perspective
item.description: Article by Youngsoog Na DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ajle-2023-0179

item.title: Law-and-Economics of Business Judgment Rule in India
item.description: Article by Youngsoog Na DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ajle-2023-0045

item.title: Does Antitakeover Provision Harm Shareholders? Indexing for Antitakeover Provisions in China
item.description: Article by Youngsoog Na DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ajle-2023-0119

item.title: Seventy Years of Marriage and Family Law in China: Achievements, Challenges and Prospects
item.description: Article by Youngsoog Na DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ajle-2023-0166

item.title: Estimating the International Cocaine Market: A Novel Combination of Excess Compensation and Stochastic Frontier Analysis
item.description: Article by Youngsoog Na DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ajle-2023-0129

item.title: Is the Korea Fair Trade Commission Abusing the Provision for Abuse of Superior Trading Position?: A Critical Analysis of the Act on Fair Intermediary Trade of Online Platforms
item.description: Article by Youngsoog Na DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ajle-2023-0176
